headline: A Look At D.R. Horton (DHI) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: D.R. Horton (DHI) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock up about 3.5% over the past day but showing double digit declines over the past month. See our latest analysis for D.R. Horton. That move comes after a 14.45% 1 month share price decline and a 5.83% year to date share price pullback. At the same time, the 1 year total shareholder return of 8.97% and 3 year total shareholder return of 45.10% point to momentum that has cooled recently. If this kind of...
